title: SOAX Fetch Content Request Structure
description: JSON Structure documentation for the SOAX Web Data API fetch-content request

fields.name: url
fields.description: Target URL to fetch content from

fields.name: proxy_settings
fields.description: Proxy configuration for geo-targeting and proxy type selection

fields.name: city
fields.description: Target city for proxy selection (use /v1/geo/cities to list options)

fields.name: isp
fields.description: Target ISP for residential proxy selection

fields.name: response
fields.description: Configure what content to include in the API response

fields.name: screenshot
fields.description: Include base64-encoded PNG screenshot of rendered page

fields.name: xhr
fields.description: Include XHR/fetch API calls captured during page rendering

fields.name: markdown
fields.description: Include lightweight Markdown version of page content

fields.name: session
fields.description: Session configuration for maintaining sticky IP sessions

fields.name: sticky
fields.description: Keep the same IP address across multiple requests in the session

fields.name: session_id
fields.description: Unique session identifier to associate related requests
